adj.description: Adjacency matrix: 1 if a is adjacent to a', 0 otherwise

r.description: Reward for being at location a at time t

cap.description: Capacity of location a at time t

assumptions.description: Every location is adjacent to itself.

code.python: assert all(adj[a][a] == 1 for a in range(nA))
assert all(cap[a][t] >= 0 for a in range(nA) for t in range(nT))

n.description: Number of flights at location a at time t

f.description: Number of flights moving from a at time t to a' at time t+1

constraints.description: All flights are accounted for at every time period.

code.gurobipy: model.addConstrs(gp.quicksum(n[a, t] for a in range(nA)) == nP for t in range(nT))

constraints.description: The number of flights at each location does not exceed the location capacity.

code.gurobipy: model.addConstrs(n[a, t] <= cap[a][t] for a in range(nA) for t in range(nT))

constraints.description: Flow conservation: flights at location a at time t equal those at t-1 plus arrivals minus departures (one-step transitions).
constraints.formulation: n_{a,t} = n_{a,t-1} + \sum_{a' \in A} f_{a',a,t-1} - \sum_{a' \in A} f_{a,a',t-1} \quad \forall a \in A, t \in T, t > 0

code.gurobipy: model.addConstrs(n[a, t] == n[a, t-1] + gp.quicksum(f[a2, a, t-1] for a2 in range(nA)) - gp.quicksum(f[a, a2, t-1] for a2 in range(nA)) for a in range(nA) for t in range(1, nT))

constraints.description: Movements are only allowed between adjacent locations.
constraints.formulation: f_{a,a',t} \leq nP \cdot \text{adj}_{a,a'} \quad \forall a, a' \in A, t \in T

code.gurobipy: model.addConstrs(f[a, a2, t] <= nP * adj[a][a2] for a in range(nA) for a2 in range(nA) for t in range(nT))

constraints.description: No movements out of the final time period (would arrive outside the horizon).

code.gurobipy: model.addConstrs(f[a, a2, nT-1] == 0 for a in range(nA) for a2 in range(nA))

constraints.description: Aggregate departures at time t do not exceed presence at time t (stay-flow non-negativity).
constraints.formulation: \sum_{a' \in A} f_{a,a',t} \leq n_{a,t} \quad \forall a \in A, t \in T

code.gurobipy: model.addConstrs(gp.quicksum(f[a, a2, t] for a2 in range(nA)) <= n[a, t] for a in range(nA) for t in range(nT))
model.addConstrs(n[a, t] >= 0 for a in range(nA) for t in range(nT))

constraints.formulation: f_{a,a',t} \geq 0 \quad \forall a, a' \in A, t \in T

code.gurobipy: model.addConstrs(f[a, a2, t] >= 0 for a in range(nA) for a2 in range(nA) for t in range(nT))

objective.description: Maximize total reward for all flights across all locations and time periods.

code.gurobipy: model.setObjective(gp.quicksum(r[a][t] * n[a, t] for a in range(nA) for t in range(nT)), GRB.MAXIMIZE)
